catalysts.thesis: CEO Jared Isaacman purchased ~$13M in stock (reported Mar 2) following a 23% post-earnings drop, signaling strong conviction that the sell-off was an overreaction.
catalysts.catalyst_details: CEO Open Market Purchase of ~296k shares reported March 2, 2026.
catalysts.absorption_status: Price stabilizing after earnings drop; insider buy triggering reversal.
catalysts.risk: Guidance miss in recent earnings; debt leverage.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Market punished guidance miss, but CEO's massive $13M buy suggests fundamentals remain intact.

catalysts.thesis: Run-up into FDA PDUFA date (March 6) for Piflufolastat F-18; momentum is strong with a 13% gain in the last 30 days.
catalysts.catalyst_details: PDUFA Date March 6, 2026 for PSMA PET imaging agent.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Niche diagnostic approval often underestimated by general market.
